Bar-c..Back: Tension in the muscles of the back. Swelling of the glands of the back of the neck. Swelling of the cervical glands. Fatty tumors upon the back.
Bar-c..Back, pain: Tension in the muscles of the back.
Bar-c..Chest: Chest full of mucus, but unable to expectorate it. You observe from the effort made in the cough that there is a weakness somewhere, a lack of power. It is not a strong effort.
Bar-c..Chill: The patient himself is chilly; sensitive to cold; wants to be well wrapped.
Bar-c..Extremities: The pains are of a gouty, rheumatic character, worse from becoming cold and from cold weather. Paralytic weakness and trembling and numbness of the feet. Offensive perspiration of the feet which causes soreness of the soles, ulcers on the feet, checked foot sweat. Trembling of the feet while standing and tottering while walking. Tearing, drawing pains in lower limbs. Sudden sharp pains in knees.
Bar-c..Generalities: Baryta carbonica is an interesting study, because it is fully proved and a constitutional remedy. Such remedies are always more interesting than the short-acting, superficial ones. They take hold in deep-seated, long-lasting, miasmatic troubles.
Bar-c..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Marked weakness with feeble pulse is a strong feature and he must lie down; he is worse standing and sitting. The weakness is worse after eating.
Bar-c..Head: Pressing headaches. Headaches ameliorated in fresh air, in the open air, and aggravated from heat. That is the opposite of its general state. The Baryta carb. general state is aggravated from cold; he is sensitive to cold, and his complaints come on from becoming cold; but his headaches are ameliorated in cool air.
Bar-c..Mind: The Baryta carb. child will be seen hiding behind the furniture when strangers come in; will hide as for shame of something or as if afraid. It imagines all sorts of strange things, that it is talked about, or laughed at.
Bar-c..Mouth: Paralysis of the tongue in old people. Weakness of the tongue in old people. Hardness of the tongue in old people.
Bar-c..Rectum: Baryta carb. has an inveterate constipation. Difficult knotty stools. Stool hard, and insufficient. A lack of action in the rectum, and hemorrhoidal protrusion during stool and urination.
Bar-c..Rectum, pain: hemorrhoidal protrusion during stool and urination.
Bar-c..Skin: So this remedy cures tumors and warts. Warts upon the limbs, and upon the back, and upon the hands.
Bar-c..Stomach: There is weakness of digestion, all sorts of disorders and disagreeable sensations in the stomach after eating. Sometimes gastralgia; sometimes distension. Stomach aches after eating. Extreme weakness after eating.
Bar-c..Stomach, pain: Sometimes gastralgia; sometimes distension. Stomach aches after eating.
Bar-c..Clinical, paralysis: It has some of the paralytic conditions analogous to the complaints in old apoplectics, and it has been very useful in re-establishing the supply and flow of nerve force along the nerves. It parallels Phos., and is an excellent remedy for old paralytic conditions that have come from a rupture of a blood vessel, and therefore pressure upon the nerve supply.
Bar-c..Generalities, pressure: Pressure in the brain. Pressing headaches.
Bar-c..Generalities, weakness: Marked weakness with feeble pulse is a strong feature and he must lie down; he is worse standing and sitting. The weakness is worse after eating.
Bar-c..Appetite: The troubles of eating and drinking and appetite and stomach can all be run together.
Bar-c..Clinical: Baryta carb. has cured fatty tumors, encysted tumors, lupus, outward growths of tuberculous character, sarcoma; and it has mitigated the pains and sufferings and has prolonged life in cancerous affections.
Bar-c..Back, dorsal region, back, left, right: Fatty tumors upon the back. Swelling of the glands of the back of the neck.
